normalized_source:
let cap = Capability()
let result = ffi_rust_read(cap, 42)

safety_boundary.boundary_description: All FFI call sites are gated by a Capability binding in scope. No unsafe blocks present (forbidden by crate policy).

marshalling_rules.conversion: Lyra Int is represented as a 64-bit signed integer in foreign ABIs
Lyra Bool maps to the C99/Rust bool type (0 = false, 1 = true)
Lyra String is passed as a null-terminated UTF-8 pointer to foreign functions
Lyra Unit corresponds to void in C and () in Rust
